home.title: Saudade
home.subtitle: A Digital Heirloom of Family Love
home.heroTagline: Preserve, share, and celebrate your most treasured family memories — safely and beautifully.
home.aboutText: Saudade was born from the longing to keep loved ones close. It is a safe, private space to collect your most precious photos and pass them forward to the next generation.
home.featuredPortraitsDesc: Birthdays, graduations, weddings — the moments that mark a life well lived.
home.featuredTraditionsDesc: Holiday gatherings, Sunday dinners, and the rituals that bind generations together.
home.featuredHeritageDesc: Vintage scans and ancestral photographs kept vivid for those who come after.

albums.title: Your Albums
albums.subtitle: Every photo, a piece of your story
albums.portraitDesc: Formal and candid portraits that capture who you are at this moment in time.
albums.couplePortraitDesc: Intimate photographs celebrating the love that started it all.
albums.childrenPortraitDesc: Watch them grow — first steps, first days of school, and every smile in between.
albums.birthdayDesc: Candles, cakes, and the joy of another year celebrated together.
albums.graduationDesc: Proud moments of achievement preserved for generations to look back on.
albums.weddingDesc: The day two families became one, held forever in these images.
albums.holidayDesc: Christmas mornings, summer reunions, and every table set with love.
albums.recipesDesc: The dishes that define your family — photographed and stored alongside the memories.
albums.vintageDesc: Precious old photographs rescued from albums, shoeboxes, and forgotten drawers.
albums.ancestryDesc: Pictures of those who came before — faces that live on in yours.

about.title: About Saudade
about.storyText: Saudade — the Portuguese word for a deep, loving nostalgia — gave this app its name and soul. We built it for families who know that a photograph is never just a photograph; it is a vessel for love, memory, and identity.
about.missionText: We believe every family deserves a beautiful, secure place to keep their story. Saudade gives you that place — private, backed up, and designed to be shared across generations.
about.valueCraft: Privacy First — Your memories belong only to you. We never sell, share, or analyze your photos.
about.valueCreativity: Crafted with Care — Every detail of the interface is designed to feel warm, personal, and worthy of your most precious moments.
about.valueCommunity: Built for Generations — Saudade grows with your family, making it easy to pass your digital heirloom forward.
about.visitAddress: End-to-end encrypted storage you can trust
about.visitHours: Access your memories on any device, any time
